name: C-8 risk-classify --dry-run reports the planned classification without writing the emit path per §2.14
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/risk-classify.sh" --use-case credit-scoring --emit r.yaml --dry-run 2>err.txt && [ ! -f r.yaml ] && grep -q 'dry-run' err.txt && echo skipped 1>&2
